violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler and all parts to it including lids need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Handles on equipment needs to be cleaned. - Shelving, Signs throughout kitchen need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Hood on fryer need to be deep cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floor in walk-in freezer needs to be cleaned under racks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Racks in walk-in cooler need to be deep cleaned. - Handles on equipment needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling in kitchen needs to be cleaned, dusty - Floor in walk-in freezer needs to be cleaned under racks.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
